name: tmux-acp-hub
description: ACP Hub — a persistent multi-agent hub for tmux: Codex, Claude Code, and any Agent Client Protocol agent in popups, with saved transcripts
author: Brian Tarqui

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('tmux-acp-hub is distributed from GitHub/TPM, not npm'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: node tests/release.mjs && node tests/theme.mjs && node tests/versions.mjs && node tests/adapter-maintenance.mjs && node tests/adapter-operations.mjs && node tests/mcp-admin.mjs && node tests/picker.mjs && node tests/composer-layout.mjs && node tests/plan-panel.mjs && node tests/permissions.mjs && node tests/prompt-lifecycle.mjs && node tests/message-roles.mjs && node tests/command-system.mjs && node tests/turn-cards.mjs && node tests/turn-card-render.mjs && node tests/frame-render.mjs && node tests/history-retention.mjs && node tests/scroll.mjs && node tests/autocomplete.mjs && node tests/highlight.mjs && node tests/render-width.mjs && node tests/titles.mjs && node tests/user-turn-render.mjs && node tests/global-layout.mjs && node tests/render-stream.mjs && node tests/render-live-table.mjs && node tests/rpc.mjs && node tests/reset.mjs && node tests/diff.mjs && node tests/health.mjs && node tests/status-counts.mjs && node tests/vim.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs
scripts.check:syntax: node --check bin/acp-hub.mjs && node --check lib/core.mjs && node --check lib/daemon.mjs && node --check lib/mcp.mjs && node --check lib/render.mjs && node --check lib/rpc.mjs && node --check lib/theme.mjs && node --check lib/ui.mjs && node --check lib/versions.mjs && node --check scripts/adapter-maintenance.mjs && sh -n acp-hub.tmux && sh -n scripts/apply-status-format.sh && sh -n scripts/close-menu.sh && sh -n scripts/lib.sh && sh -n scripts/resurrect-exclude.sh && sh -n scripts/switcher.sh && sh -n scripts/tmux-menu.sh && sh -n scripts/workspace.sh
